title: PowerRanks
body:
Introducing PowerRanks, a plugin that brings customizable ranks to your server.

With PowerRanks, you can assign a special prefix to each rank, allowing other players to easily see your status. Not only that, but you have the ability to define the ChatColor and NameColor for each rank, adding a personalized touch to your server.

----

### Why choose PowerRanks?

**Speedy Performance**: Changes you make are reflected instantly, thanks to PowerRanks' optimization for speed.

**User-Friendly Setup**: Permissions can be configured either through commands or in the configuration files, making it easy for server administrators.

**Tailored to Your Needs**: PowerRanks offers a range of customization options to adapt to your server's unique requirements.

**No Cost Attached**: PowerRanks is available for download and usage absolutely free.

----

The standard ranks provided include Member, Moderator, Admin, and Owner, but feel free to modify or remove them as you see fit. Plus, PowerRanks doesn't limit you - you can create as many ranks as you need.

In addition, PowerRanks comes equipped with an auto-updater. By default, it checks for updates, but you have the option to enable automatic downloads. You can also update configuration files directly. For more details, refer to the 'config.yml'.

Ready to elevate your server experience? Try PowerRanks today!

----


### More information

Documentation and usage examples are available on https://docs.powerranks.nl

### Placeholders

PowerRanks uses PlaceholderAPI to manage placeholders.

A list of placeholders is available at: https://github.com/PlaceholderAPI/PlaceholderAPI/wiki/Placeholders#powerranks
